name: code1
synccode: <div>cdir=`pwd`</div><div>pfr vsh.drawio drawio.ohm drawio.srw $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | pfr 1.txt styleexpander.ohm styleexpander.srw $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | pfr 2.txt attributeelider.ohm attributeelider.srw $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | pfr 3.txt emitFactbase.ohm emitFactbase.srw $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | sort &gt;5.pl</div><div><br></div>echo done &gt;/dev/fd/4

name: code2
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1"># augment the factbase (fb.pl) after every inferencing step</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">cat 5.pl 6.pl | sort &gt;fb.pl</span></p><p class="p2" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34; ; min-height: 13px"><span class="s1"></span>echo done &gt;/dev/fd/4<br></p>

name: code3
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">./run-queries.bash &gt;7.json</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">echo done &gt;/dev/fd/4<br></span></p>

name: code4
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">node emitBash.js</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">echo done &gt;/dev/fd/4<br></span></p>

name: code5
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">chmod a+x VSH</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">echo done &gt;/dev/fd/4<br></span></p>

name: code6
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">## create rect fact for every vertex that is not an edge/ellipse/text</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">## sequence.drawio file contains vertexes, and marks all edge and ellipse (and text)</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">## but does not mark rectangles (the default)</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">## this pass finds the defaults and creates explicit rect(...) facts</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">swipl -q \</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1"><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; </span>-g 'consult(5).' \</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1"><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; </span>-g 'consult(rects).' \</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1"><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; </span>-g 'printRects.' \</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1"><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; </span>-g 'halt.' \</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1"><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; </span>&gt; 6.pl</span></p><p class="p2" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34; ; min-height: 13px"><span class="s1"></span>echo done &gt;/dev/fd/4</p>
